title: A New Chapter in French-Syrian Relations
text:

A New Chapter in French-Syrian Relations
The Warcast
Joshua Landis and Nicole Wiley
July 17, 2026

Sign up now and start listening to "The Warcast!"Already a member? Sign In to have access to our podcasts

Episode Notes:
Nicole sits down with Joshua Landis to make sense of French President Macron's visit to Syria and the restoration of full diplomatic relations between Paris and Damascus. They look at why France moved so quickly to re-engage, what the renewed relationship offers each side, and how Syria is weighing its defense and security interests between the West and Russia.
Image: European Union via Wikimedia Commons
